channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Should a print subscription be considered? I used HP’s All-In Plan for two months to find out
item.description: Is the all-in-one approach for you or your business?

item.title: Verizon deal includes not one, not two, but four Galaxy S26 on a super cheap unlimited plan — and you don't have to trade
item.description: Verizon's latest deal on the Galaxy S26 waives the trade-in criteria, gets you up to four devices for cheap, and even throws in a tablet and smartwatch.

item.title: Microsoft's CEO promised the world to consumers in a speech about fixing Windows 11 — but one thing Satya Nadella said worries me
item.description: Satya Nadella talking about consumers in relation to Windows 11 is mostly reassuring, with a notable exception.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses, Google Photos et Gemini : tout ce qu’il ne fallait pas rater – L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Des lunettes connectées Samsung, un bug Google Photos et des évolutions pour Gemini. Voici ce qui a marqué l'actu tech de la semaine.

item.title: KitchenAid Artisan Plus Stand Mixer Review: Tiny Additions, Big Difference
item.description: The kitchen appliance titan changed up its beloved base-model stand mixer for the first time in over 70 years. It was worth the wait.

item.title: 'The only worry is for your budget': Microsoft briefly says 32GB of RAM is the 'no worries' level for gaming on Windows 11, but users fear getting priced out
item.description: A new Microsoft blog post recommended 32GB of RAM for serious gamers, but after user backlash, it's gone again.

item.title: Ce dimanche uniquement, l’iPhone 17 chute sous les 800 euros
item.description: L'iPhone 17 s'offre seulement une journée de French Days puisque chez Rakuten il perd presque 10 % de son prix dans une offre uniquement valable ce dimanche.

item.title: Caméras d’action : les meilleures caméras de sport en 2026
item.description: GoPro, DJI, Insta360... vous trouverez différentes marques sur le marché des caméras d'action. Laquelle choisir pour vous dans tout ça ? Voici nos meilleures recommandations pour une bonne action cam en 2026.

item.title: Coway Airmega Mighty2 Review: The Sequel Is Better Than the Original
item.description: Coway's most popular air purifier gets an upgrade in looks and purification strength, though I wish it had wheels and an app.

item.title: From controller to camera — this photography sim is the ultimate training tool for your next shoot in the real outdoors
item.description: From Iceland to Italy and Japan to Australia, Lushfoil Photography Sim faithfully recreates beautiful landscapes to explore with your virtual camera and lenses

item.title: NASA video shows how much ground a Mars rover has covered, literally
item.description: A timelapse video from NASA's Curiosity shows the rover traversing Mars over six years. The montage also has a scientific purpose.

item.title: Get AdGuard Family Plan for $16 and protect up to 9 devices
item.description: Save on the AdGuard Family Plan with this lifetime subscription deal, covering up to nine devices with ad blocking and privacy tools for $15.97.

item.title: Access all your AI tools in one spot with this Chrome extension, now $75 for life
item.description: See answers from multiple AI models in one convenient spot thanks to ChatPlayground AI.

item.title: This $10 upgrade transforms your PC — but it’s only on sale until midnight
item.description: Upgrade a PC affordably with this Microsoft Windows 11 Pro license.

item.title: 3 AdultFriendFinder red flags — how to avoid scams on AFF
item.description: Here are three red flags to look out for as you use AFF, to help you spot potential scammers and separate the authentic users from the fake profiles.

item.title: Xbox « Helix » : Puissance, prix, jeux, sortie… Tout ce que l’on sait sur la console next-gen
item.description: La prochaine console de jeu Xbox, connue sous le nom de code Project Helix, approche. Voici ce que l'on sait sur ses caractéristiques, ses jeux, et ses nouveautés.
